sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Mihing Tapa hong paikik na’ng tua khuavak pha zingsang le,
Micin namin lak panin Ama’ mite hong ciahpih

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Hotkhiatsate’ kikhopna lian itna gam sungah;

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: A gamdai hankhuk le tuipi sung panin;

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: a omna mun tua khuapi lian i et ciang,
A khawnkhong a luang nuntakna gun mu ding;
khensa lawmte nuamna tawh i muh hun ciang,

sections.label: Verse 4
lines: Kumpipa hong pai laitak ding, a hun hong nai khinzo ta,
“Mit phiat kal sung hun tomno ah” eite i kikhel khin
